title: Hallmark
summary: Hallmark Cards, Inc. was founded in Kansas City, Missouri in 1910 and has been known primarily as an American greeting card and holiday decorative company. First introduced in 1973, Hallmark has produced more than 8,400 different Keepsake Christmas ornaments, encompassing a wide variety of themes and entertainment properties.

title: Hot Wheels Model Car Kits
summary: A Model Car Kit is a toy car, usually in 1:32, 1:25 & 1:24 scale that needs to be assembled, glued, painted, and put together to have a finished custom car. Hot Wheels has released many kits for many years under different Model Kit companies such as AMT, Polar Lights, Snaps, Revell, and many more listed below.

title: Display Case Artwork
summary: Artwork on the front of each case has varied over the years. This is a page to add pictures of the various artwork for different size car cases. Some of these cases where made by Tara Toys.

title: G-Machines
summary: 200px|rightG-Machines were a series 1:50 scale premium cars released from 2006 - 2008. The line emphasized bold, aggressive styling with exaggerated proportions, reminiscent of the 'Tooned series.
